meanings.definition: (used especially of glances) directed to one side with or as if with doubt or suspicion or envy; - Elizabeth Bowen
examples: her eyes with their misted askance look

meanings.definition: situated at or extending to the side; ; - Tennyson
examples: the lateral branches of a tree

meanings.definition: inclining or directed to one side;  - Bram Stoker
examples: moved downward in a sidelong way
the plow lay sidelong on the ground

meanings.definition: with the side toward someone or something; - Nathaniel Hawthorne
to, toward or at one side
examples: darting eyes looking sidelong out of a wizened face
